calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amira Hasenbush appeared by zoom for and with Theresa Thomas (petitioner) by zoom.

The court stated that it reviewed the filings and that it is prepared to grant the petition. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is granted per written order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Aguerre. Not reported.
